title: hieracium murorum subsp. pleiotrichum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. pleiotrichum, also known as rock hawkweed or wall hawkweed, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium murorum subsp. pleiotrichum include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive problems, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve skin health. The herbal preparations of Hieracium murorum subsp. pleiotrichum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
